content.en:
Ye Tian now has several kinds of Supreme Legendary Blood in his hands, which Supreme Legendary Blood should he take?

"Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape!"

"Eight-winged golden cicada!"

"Nine-Colored Gu Peng!"

"Night Dragon!"

......

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and finally decided to refine the Golden Scale Ancient Dragon, the Golden Scale Ancient Dragon was the strongest of these supreme legendary-level creatures, and it was also the last supreme legendary-level creature he killed.

The Golden Scale Ancient Dragon's Strongest Legendary Blood, the effect should be the best.

"Then take the Blood of the Golden Scale Ancient Dragon's Mighty Legend!"

Ye Tian took out the blood of the Golden Scale Ancient Dragon's Supreme Legend, swallowed it in one gulp, and then began to refine it.

Rumble!!!!!

The blood of the Golden Scale Ancient Dragon Supreme Legend was integrated into Ye Tian's body little by little, and the legendary body inheritance belonging to it was also released step by step, and was absorbed by Ye Tian.

Gradually, Ye Tianming realized the cultivation method of a legendary body.

"Legend of the Dragon Scales!"

The Dragon Scale Legendary requires a variety of materials to be successfully crafted.

One of the most precious is the dragon scale ancient stone, which is very valuable.

However, Ye Tian found dozens of dragon scale ancient stones in the Sea of Fog, and some in the legendary world, and there is no shortage at present.

As for the other materials, most of them have been found, and only six materials are missing.

"These six materials are not difficult to find, and almost all of them can be exchanged in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

Subsequently.

He went to exchange them, and soon obtained these six materials, and this was all together.

Once the materials are ready, then it will begin to officially impact the Legend to the Dao Realm.

......

Rumble!!!!!

One by one, the materials were devoured and refined by Ye Tian, and the legendary body began to be cast in the way of the dragon scale legend body, and if you want to cast the dragon scale legend body, you need to comprehend the third sequence of supreme rules.

And Ye Tian even comprehended the rules of the second sequence of the Dao, and it was naturally not difficult to break through.

With the passage of time, the dragon scale legend body gradually took shape under the tempering of the second sequence of supreme rules.

Tens of thousands of years have passed since the Dao Era, and the Dragon Scale Legend's body has finally been successfully condensed.

In an instant, a terrifying aura spread from the Winter Night Fortress, causing countless Supreme Dao Realms to shiver and look at Ye Tian's retreat.

"Elder Ye has broken through!"

Ye Tian was originally a Ninefold Dao Realm who took the path of the strongest to the Dao, and now that he has broken through to the Legendary Dao Realm, how terrifying his strength will become!

Soon, the news spread, and countless Dao realms were envious.

Sioux Domain.

Su Changsheng was not surprised at all when he learned that Ye Tian had broken through.

After all, Ye Tian has the blood of the strongest legend, and the Supreme Dao Rules have comprehended the second sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules realm, if Ye Tian can't break through, then no one can break through.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian's cultivation has steadily reached the level of the Legend to the Dao Realm.

"I have finally reached the Legendary Dao Realm, but now it should only be the initial cultivation of the Legendary Dao Realm, and even the Dragon Scale Legendary Body is only the entry realm, and the only advantage is to comprehend the rules of the second sequence of the Dao, but the strength is still very far from a strong person like Soho!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The next step for him is to improve his cultivation, and he also has to raise the dragon scale legend body to the realm of Xiaocheng, Dacheng and Consummation.

And if you want to improve the realm of the dragon scale legend body, you have to prepare a large number of materials, which can even be called a large number of materials.

"No wonder the Ancient Emperor of Longyan wants to keep buying Longyan Linshi, the main reason is that the number of needs is too much!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He still has a little dragon scale ancient stone in his hand now, but the number of needs is too much, and this dragon scale ancient stone is completely a drop in the bucket, and it is not enough at all.

"I can't say it, I also have to learn from the Elder of the Longyan Ancient Emperor and acquire a large number of Dragon Scale Ancient Stones, otherwise I will have to collect them slowly by myself, and I don't know how many long years!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After Ye Tian came out, many legends and Dao Realm came to congratulate, including some elders, including Elder Longyan Ancient Emperor, Su Changsheng and so on.

"Congratulations to Elder Ye for breaking through the Legend to the Dao Realm!!!"

A group of legends congratulated him on the Dao realm.

Ye Tian entertained these legends to the Dao realm one by one, and at the same time held a grand celebration in the human realm, inviting all forces, and also announcing that he had broken through to become a legend to the Dao realm.

This event was held for a long time before it dispersed.

And from this moment on, he is also a veritable elder.

Unlike before, he was named an elder, but he was only a cultivator of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and many of them were still unconvinced.

But now, there is no legend to the Dao realm that dares to be unconvinced.

......

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian and the Ancient Emperor of Longyan were sitting together and chatting, and they were also asking the Ancient Emperor of Longyan for advice.

"Elder Long Yan, the Golden Feather Liquid that was rewarded to our elders is a good thing, how can we get more Golden Feather Liquid?" Ye Tian asked.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan smiled and said, "I also want to get more Agar Golden Feather Liquid, but unfortunately I can't help it! Do you know how to get the Agar Golden Feather Liquid? It takes an elder to go to a special place to refine a full three million to the Dao Era before he can extract a Agar Golden Feather Liquid! Therefore, only the new elders can obtain a Qiong Jelly Golden Feather Liquid, and every 100 million to the Dao Era, the elders will take out a batch of Agar Golden Feather Liquid for the elders to exchange." Now, there are still 60 million Dao Era before the next batch of redemption time, and it is currently impossible to exchange. "

There are still 60 million to the Dao Era before you can exchange for the Golden Feather Liquid?

Ye Tian frowned slightly, it seemed that there was no way at the moment.

"Elder Longyan, I am cultivating the Dragon Scale Legend, and I need to purchase a large number of Dragon Scale Ancient Stones, do you have them in your hands?" Ye Tian asked.

"There are some dragon scale ancient stones, but I need dragon rock lin stones, five cubic dragon rock lin stones in exchange for one cubic dragon scale ancient stone. Longyan Ancient Emperor said.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian agreed.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian traded some dragon scale ancient stones with some other elders or forces, and gradually harvested a lot of dragon scale ancient stones, but relying on these dragon scale ancient stones to cultivate the dragon scale legend body to the realm of Xiaocheng, it is estimated that it is still a little worse.

I have to say that if you want to cultivate a supreme legendary body to the consummation realm, the resources and energy spent are unimaginable.

The Lost Realm.

Ye Tian entered here again, but he didn't come in as a legendary Dao Realm, but copied a copy body of a Ninefold Dao Realm, let such a copy body enter, and then look for the Longyan Lin Stone.

After a period of time, he found another 500 cubic meters of Longyan Lin Stone, and then came out to trade with the Ancient Emperor of Longyan for a hundred cubic meters of dragon scale ancient stones, and there were about more than 100 large and small dragon scale ancient stones.

Before I knew it, another 100,000 years had passed.

His dragon scale ancient stones and other materials were consumed, but the dragon scale legend body had only improved by one-third, and he was still far from breaking through to the Xiaocheng realm.
